name: 翻译助手
description: 文本翻译模块，支持中英日韩法德西等多语言互译，自动检测源语言
description_en: Text translation module supporting Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, French, German, Spanish and more with auto language detection

apis.name: translate
apis.desc: 翻译文本，支持指定源语言和目标语言
apis.desc_en: Translate text with specified source and target languages
paramDesc: 源语言代码(zh/en/ja/ko/fr/de/es等)，留空自动检测
目标语言代码，支持多种语言逗号分隔如'en,ja,ko'，传'all'翻译成所有支持的语言，默认en
paramDesc_en: Source language code (zh/en/ja/ko/fr/de/es etc), empty for auto
Target language code, supports multiple comma-separated like 'en,ja,ko', pass 'all' to translate into all supported languages, default en

apis.name: detectLanguage
apis.desc_en: Detect the language of given text

apis.name: openPage
apis.desc: 打开翻译助手界面并返回 _openModule 信号
apis.desc_en: Open Translator UI and return _openModule signal
